title: Add dashboard surfaces for candidate assessment bundles and workflow KPIs
description:
## Summary
Add dashboard surfaces for optimization workflow results so operators can understand candidate assessments and KPI trends.

## Deliverables
- Surface the candidate assessment bundle in the dashboard.
- Show deterministic-versus-random evidence and generalization-gap metrics clearly.
- Show the workflow decision and the evidence that drove it.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: add dashboard surfaces for candidate assessment bundles and workflow KPIs (stage evidence, generalization-gap metrics, and workflow decision context).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementation slice: add EvaluationTask detail surface for candidate assessment compact summary (task.metadata.candidate_assessment_compact_summary), including decision, stage evidence (deterministic/random loop/random gate), generalization-gap KPIs, and attachment key display.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented dashboard surface in EvaluationTask detail for task.metadata.candidate_assessment_compact_summary (schema candidate_assessment_bundle.v1): decision/reason/confidence, stage evidence rows (deterministic/random loop/random gate with evaluation IDs/statuses/deltas), generalization-gap KPI block, primary route action, and bundle attachment key display. Validation: jest EvaluationTask.memo.test.tsx passed. build:fast currently fails in this repo due unrelated missing pages (/alerts, /activity, /batches, docs routes), not from this component patch.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed and pushed: dashboard now surfaces candidate assessment compact summary in EvaluationTask detail (decision, decision reason/confidence, stage evidence for deterministic/random loop/random gate with IDs/statuses/deltas, generalization-gap KPIs, primary route action, bundle attachment key). Commit: cd104b0e8.
